name: Political Party Bad Debt Deduction for Accrual Taxpayers

eligibility.description: Must use accrual accounting, show the debt arose from a bona fide sale of goods/services in the ordinary course of business, and demonstrate substantial continuing efforts to collect.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a bad debt deduction for uncollectible receivables from political parties if the taxpayer uses the accrual method and more than 30% of their receivables are from political parties.
